scripts.desktop:build: pnpm --dir web run build:desktop && cargo build -p bifrost-cli --release && node scripts/prepare-tauri-sidecar.mjs release && pnpm exec tauri build --config desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.desktop:dev: pnpm --dir web run build:desktop && cargo build -p bifrost-cli && node scripts/prepare-tauri-sidecar.mjs debug && pnpm exec tauri dev --config desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.release:all: pnpm run cli:build && pnpm run desktop:build
